# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
// Plugin Name: User Authentication
// Description: A WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords.

require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-includes/pluggable.php';

class UserAuthentication {
  private $users = array();

  public function __construct() {
    $this->users = get_option('users');
  }

  // Register a new user
  public function register($username, $password) {
    if (!$this->userExists($username)) {
      $this->users[] = array(
        'username' => $username,
        'password' => password_hash($password, PASSWORD_DEFAULT),
      );

      update_option('users', $this->users);
    } else {
      return false;
    }
  }

  // Login a user
  public function login($username, $password) {
    if ($this->userExists($username)) {
      $user = $this->getUserByUsername($username);

      if (password_verify($password, $user['password'])) {
        return true;
      } else {
        return false;
      }
    } else {
      return false;
    }
  }

  // Check if a user exists
  private function userExists($username) {
    foreach ($this->users as $user) {
      if ($user['username'] === $username) {
        return true;
      }
    }

    return false;
  }

  // Get a user by username
  public function getUserByUsername($username) {
    foreach ($this->users as $user) {
      if ($user['username'] === $username) {
        return $user;
      }
    }

    return null;
  }
}
